dimensions.rationale: Revision 14 changes only ownership attribution for already implemented compact-context hardening; release scope and acceptance semantics are unchanged.
The previously unowned compact-context runtime, profile and test paths are now assigned to WS-05. The workstream write sets remain overlap-free.
The refreeze preserves EXPERIMENTAL source-release maturity and keeps VERIFIED/production promotion blocked until external live evidence exists.

findings.message: Compact-context hardening paths were valid implementation work but were not assigned in the frozen write-set contract.
findings.requiredAction: Assign src/agent_lifecycle/context, tests/context and profiles/small-context-profile.v1.json to WS-05 and rerun ownership, plan, neutrality and release gates.

findings.message: The previous final proof was bound to an older source revision than the current release candidate.
findings.requiredAction: Generate fresh final evidence for the current source revision before tagging or publishing the next source release.

summary: Revision 14 is READY_TO_FREEZE as a minimal ownership and evidence-lineage correction. It changes no product scope, task DAG, adapter maturity, production-promotion boundary or runtime behavior.
